round_history.session_parent_reason: pair_specific_filter failed in v001 because it added ETH trades (11 vs champion's 9) with worse PF (0.40 vs 0.51). Switching to tighten_entry_trigger to raise the bar on all entries, specifically targeting the momentum quality at entry to reduce stop-loss frequency without dropping trade count below 25.

macd_cross_momentum.tighten_rsi: RSI < 65 (was likely < 70 or uncapped; tighter ceiling avoids entries near overbought that reverse into stoploss)
macd_cross_momentum.add_macd_histogram_rising: MACD histogram must be positive AND rising for at least 1 bar (confirms momentum acceleration, not just a cross)

changed_items.description: Add ADX > 20 filter to require directional strength before entering. Tighten RSI ceiling from 70 to 65. Require MACD histogram > 0 and rising (current bar > previous bar). These three filters together should eliminate the weakest 2-3 entries that typically hit stoploss.

minimal_roi.description: 提高早期 ROI 目标，延长持仓让利润跑得更远；降低后期 ROI 兜底值避免微利退出

trailing_stop_positive.description: 提高 trailing_stop_positive 使盈利交易锁定更多利润

trailing_stop_positive_offset.description: 提高 offset 让利润跑得更远再启动 trailing

round_history.session_parent_reason: pair_specific_filter failed (too few trades), tighten_entry_trigger failed (still hit stoploss), adjust_roi failed (lower ROI profit didn't compensate). Adding ATR volatility filter targets the root cause: entries during high-volatility periods that trigger stoploss.

add_indicator.name: atr_ratio
add_indicator.code:
dataframe['atr'] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
dataframe['atr_sma'] = dataframe['atr'].rolling(window=20).mean()
dataframe['atr_ratio'] = dataframe['atr'] / dataframe['atr_sma']

add_entry_condition.description: Only enter when ATR ratio is below 1.3 (volatility not spiking)

changed_items.additional_indicator: 计算 ema20_slope = (dataframe['ema20'] - dataframe['ema20'].shift(3)) / dataframe['ema20'].shift(3)，要求 ema20_slope > 0.0005（微正斜率即可，避免过度过滤）

round_history.session_parent_reason: 基于champion v004，其4笔止损集中在ETH/USDT(2笔)和SOL/USDT(2笔)。添加protections可在单币种连续亏损后暂停该币种交易，减少验证区间的止损叠加效应。

changed_items.description: 添加两层保护：1) CooldownPeriod - 每笔交易后冷却12根5分钟K线(1小时)避免连续入场；2) MaxDrawdown - 最近48根K线内如果4笔交易回撤超1.5%则暂停24根K线。这直接减少止损连击场景。

round_history.session_parent_reason: 基于 champion v004，ETH 是唯一亏损币种（PF=0.51），4 笔止损中至少 2 笔来自 ETH。remove_bad_entry_condition 未在本 run 中失败过，且与之前失败的 pair_specific_filter（完全排除）和 tighten_entry_trigger（全局收紧）方向不同。

entry_logic.ETH/USDT: 在现有 macd_cross_momentum 条件基础上，为 ETH 额外要求: (1) close > EMA50, (2) ADX > 28, (3) RSI < 65（避免追高入场）。移除 ETH 在 RSI<70 即可入场的宽松条件。
entry_logic.SOL/USDT: 保持现有条件不变，SOL 表现良好无需调整。
entry_logic.BTC/USDT_XRP/USDT: 保持现有条件，允许在满足 macd_cross_momentum 时正常入场，可能贡献少量额外交易。

indicators_to_add: ema50 (用于 ETH 趋势过滤)
changed_items.minimal_roi: 不变，保持现有 ROI 阶梯

reason_detail: 训练区间 PF 低于 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260530_031150_v004：0.7058 < 1.0027
固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益：训练 ROI +10.2613，固定止损 -15.1667

common_failure_patterns: 最差验证月份拖累整体表现
训练区间交易数低于目标下限

本轮_nearest_问题: 训练 PF 低于 historical_best 或目标时，不得覆盖正式 best
下一轮建议: 分析 nearest_candidate 在盈利验证区间有效、但在亏损验证区间失效的原因
优先做 pair_specific_filter 或 tag_specific_filter
减少导致亏损验证区间固定止损的入场

lessons_for_next_run: 不要重新生成完全不同策略
优先围绕 nearest_candidate 和 historical_best 做单点小步调整
目标总交易数是 25~80，不是单币种 25~80
如果 nearest_candidate 交易数略超标，例如 98 笔，下一轮目标是压到 60~80 笔
优先减少固定止损亏损
优先削减验证区间持续拖累的 pair / entry_tag，而不是扩大止损
避免与历史失败策略相似
